tasks.title: Learn React Basics
tasks.description: JSX, components, props — the building blocks of every React app.

tasks.title: Understand useState
tasks.description: State triggers re-renders. Immutability is key.

tasks.title: Master useEffect
tasks.description: Side effects, cleanup, and the dependency array.

tasks.title: Learn useRef
tasks.description: Refs for DOM access and mutable values that don't trigger re-renders.

tasks.title: Context API
tasks.description: Global state without prop drilling. Split contexts for performance.

tasks.title: React Router
tasks.description: Client-side routing, nested routes, useParams, useSearchParams.

tasks.title: API Integration
tasks.description: fetch, axios, React Query — connecting React to a real backend.

tasks.title: Testing with RTL
tasks.description: Jest and React Testing Library — confidence that code works.
